---
title: "George Eliot\'s Life, as related in her Letters and Journals Arranged and edited by her husband J. W. Cross."
---

## George Eliot\'s Life, as related in her Letters and Journals Arranged and edited by her husband J. W. Cross.

**Author:** George Eliot
**Date:** 1885
**Imprint:** Edinburgh: Blackwood

---

[← Back to all letters](../../letters.html)
